title: Susquehanna Raises Array Technologies (ARRY) Price Target Amid Q2 2023 Earnings Preview
text: Array Technologies delivered $508 million in revenue in Q2 2023, representing 21% year-over-year growth. Company expanded gross margin year-over-year by over 2,000 basis points to impressive 29.6%. Adjusted EBITDA for quarter was $116 million, increase of almost $95 million from prior year. Array produced more adjusted EBITDA in first half of 2023 than it did in full years 2021 and 2022 combined. Company faced near-term headwinds: Additional $150 million of revenue was moved from 2023 to 2024, incremental to pushouts already assumed in previous analysis. While company added approximately $600 million of new bookings that quarter, smaller percentage represented 2023 deliveries than anticipated. ARRY last reported earnings on August 08, 2023 after market close, with conference call for investors at 5:00 PM eastern on same day.
